subject: Rolycoly, a small coal-chunk Pokemon in a fiery underground mine environment
description: A small, round Pokemon composed of dark grey-black coal sits amid a dramatic underground mine scene. The surrounding environment glows with vivid orange and red fire light from visible lava or burning coal veins in the cave walls and floor. The creature has a single visible eye glowing with warm light. Shattered and scattered coal chunks and glowing embers fill the foreground. The scene is intense and industrial, lit entirely by the natural heat of the underground fire environment.
foreground: dark coal-chunk Pokemon body, scattered coal fragments, glowing embers
background: underground mine cave with glowing lava veins and fire light
